title.en: The Yunmeng Mist Mercenary Group, a secret room.

content.en:
The Yunmeng Mist Mercenary Group, a secret room.

This place is shrouded in formations, and it has a soundproof effect, and unless it is a supreme, it is difficult to peek into the dialogue inside.

And at this moment, the Yunlan Juggernaut was chatting with the Meiyuan Juggernaut about Ye Tian.

"Master Mei Yuan, this Fa Tian Juggernaut is the ultimate juggernaut, how could he join our Yunmeng Mist Mercenary Group, do you know his origin?" asked Yun Lan Juggernaut.

"I don't know why he joined our Yunmeng Mist Mercenary Regiment, but this is at least a good thing! With a Master of the Extreme Masters joining, it will be safer for us to enter the Mist Region this time. Leader, you have reached the ultimate of domination for many years, just because of your cultivation talent, you have been staying in the domination realm, if you get a treasure in the mist area that can raise your cultivation talent to the mixed level, then you can be promoted to the Tianzun realm, and there is no hope of entering the supreme level in the future! If you become a Tianzun, our Yunmeng Mist Mercenary Group's life in the Heavenly Crescent Ancient City will naturally be better, and we will not be excluded by other Mist Mercenary Groups!"

Plum Garden dominates the road.

"Hopefully!" muttered the Yunlan Juggernaut.

Suddenly, she said: "The recruitment of temporary members must be strictly controlled. My father, the dignified Heavenly Venerable, was only because he recruited a Celestial Venerable who was full of evil that he fell in the misty region, and even almost wiped out our Yunmeng Mist Mercenary Group. I don't want this to happen again!"

"Don't worry, Sister Leader, I've been testing it with the Sin Bead, the Fa Heaven Master who just joined has a very low sin karma, and he is definitely not a bad person, so you can rest assured!

"Well, you know it in your heart, and I'm relieved!"

Yunlan Juggernaut nodded.

--------

Three years have passed in a flash.

this day.

The Yunlan Juggernaut began to gather the members of the Yunmeng Mist Mercenary Regiment, and they were about to set off.

Because, the fog area appeared.

Cloud Dream Mist Mercenary Regiment, Hall.

Ye Tian appeared here, and the other members also arrived one by one.

Ye Tian swept it, there were a total of 21 people here, including him and a total of five masters, it was obvious that the Yunmeng Mist Mercenary Group had not recruited a single master during this time, but had recruited several cosmic gods.

Judging from the breath of these cosmic gods, they are ordinary cosmic gods, and they must be the kind of cosmic gods who have lived for many years and want to try their luck in the misty area.

If it weren't for Ye Tian's strong strength and not relying on the Mist Mercenary Group, otherwise he would not have been able to join such a Mist Mercenary Group.

"Everyone, the misty area has appeared, we are about to enter the misty mercenary group, before entering the misty area, I have a few points to declare, the first must follow the arrangement, if anyone dares to make trouble, don't blame me for being polite. Second, each person takes a formation disk, enters the fog area, and opens all the array disks to form a defensive formation that can move freely, which will be much safer. Otherwise, the Mist Beasts will appear, and they will be faster than you can imagine, and they will kill you in an instant before you can even react!"

Yunlan Juggernaut reminded.

Everyone looked solemn, and everyone knew very well that entering the foggy area was no joke, and the mortality rate was too high.

Even if you follow the Mist Mercenary Group, no matter how experienced you are, there is still the possibility of death.

Even if you're unlucky, it's very possible that a misty mercenary group will be wiped out.

Yunlan Juggernaut paid more attention to Ye Tian, after all, Ye Tian was also an extremely strong man, and he was a temporary member, so she naturally had to pay more attention.

What made her frown was that Ye Tian was very indifferent, even if she was about to enter the misty area, she still didn't have a trace of nervousness.

That's not a good thing!

If you don't have enough awe for the misty area, if you don't care, something will really happen.

"I hope that the Heavenly Lord of Law will not mess around when he enters the misty area!"

Yun Lan dominates the dark path.

"Let's go!"

Yun Lan dominated the team and left the Heavenly Crescent City with everyone, and immediately flew towards the misty area.

Along the way, there were lights in the sky above the chaotic sea, and all of them were strong men above the cosmic gods.

Everyone's purpose is the same, to enter the Misty Zone.

"There are so many strong people, I don't know how many will be able to come out by then!"

Ye Tian said secretly in his heart.

Soon, the crowd was in the vicinity of the Misty Zone.

"This is the Misty Zone!"

Ye Tian saw the misty area for the first time and tried to use his divine sense to probe the situation in the misty area, but there was a force in the mist area that hindered the divine sense's exploration.

Ye Tian has some understanding of this situation.

According to the intelligence, the misty area has a natural barrier with the outside world, and the divine sense cannot pass through.

Even within the misty region, the divine consciousness and soul power were suppressed very strongly, and the scope of exploration was limited.

"Hey, isn't this the Yunmeng Mist Mercenary Group, even a few people dare to enter the Mist Area, aren't you afraid that the whole army will be wiped out?"

A voice came, causing the anger of Lord Yunlan.

Wow!!!!

A group of cosmic gods and masters came to the front of the Yunlan Lord under the leadership of a Heavenly Venerable.

"Blood Wolf Tianzun, it's you!"

Lord Yunlan was furious, because she had a grudge against this Blood Wolf Heavenly Venerable, and it was the Blood Wolf Heavenly Venerable who caused her father to fall in the misty region in the first place.

She knew, but she couldn't get revenge.

If it weren't for her father and some Tianzun friends, he warned the Blood Wolf Tianzun and made the Blood Wolf Tianzun jealous, so that he didn't dare to attack her, otherwise she would have died at the hands of the Blood Wolf.

"Temporary members of the Yunmeng Mist Mercenary Group, I am the leader of the Blood Wolf Mist Mercenary Group, you follow the Yunmeng Mist Mercenary Group into the Mist Area, almost ten deaths, it is better to follow me, I have entered the Mist Area many times, plus I am a Tianzun, if you are careful in the outer area, there is almost nothing. Are you following the Yunmeng Mist Mercenary Regiment, or are you following us?"

Blood Wolf Tianzun said loudly.

He didn't care about some temporary members of the Cosmic God, he was the one who deliberately dug up the Yunlan Master, so that the overall strength of the Yunmeng Mist Mercenary Group dominated by Yunlan would be weakened, and the greater the risk of entering the Mist Area.

Originally, those cosmic gods had no choice but to join the Yunmeng Mist Mercenary Group because the other Mist Mercenary Group didn't want them, but now that a big mercenary group like the Blood Wolf Mercenary Group invited them, they naturally chose to join the Blood Wolf Mercenary Group.

"Yunlan Juggernaut, this is the array disk!"

One by one, the cosmic gods returned the array disk to the Yunlan Juggernaut, and even ran to the side of the Blood Wolf Mercenary Group without waiting for the Yunlan Juggernaut to speak.

"Hahaha, Lord Yunlan, I hope you can survive in the misty area!"

Blood Wolf Tianzun left such a sentence, and led the person into the misty area.

"I'm so angry, this Blood Wolf Tianzun is really excessive!"

The Plum Garden Juggernaut scolded.
